steps.title: Find the original y-intercept
steps.content:
Set $x = 0$ in the original equation $12x + 22y = 132$:
$$22y = 132$$
$$y = 6$$
The original $y$-intercept is $(0, 6)$.

steps.title: Apply the vertical shift
steps.content:
When a graph shifts down by 4 units, all $y$-coordinates decrease by 4. The new $y$-intercept is:
$$6 - 4 = 2$$
The resulting $y$-intercept is $(0, 2)$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
